## Week in Review: 2026-03-11 to 2026-03-17

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 24.3.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 9.4 (+15.8% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 7.9 (+7.8% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 6.9 (+17.1% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.21)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 24.3 (+21.4% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.12)
